params.name: Shining Trapezohedron
params.description:
On Nov 28, 1934 AD, an overly curious man discovered the Shining Trapezohedron.
This peculiar-looking tool was made to seal an evil existence. Although it looks like a colorfully odd egg-shaped object at first glance, its numerous irregular planes on the surface prove that it is not an ordinary craft. It is said that when it is placed in the darkness, some indescribable existence will be released, but the authenticity of this information has yet to be confirmed by anyone…
